import os
import sys
import json
import logging
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from pathlib import Path
from .config import load_config
from .database import DatabaseConnection
from .cache import CacheManager
from .auth import authenticate_user, authorize_action
from .models import User, Role, Permission
from .validators import validate_request, validate_response
from .serializers import serialize_user, deserialize_user
from .exceptions import AppError, ValidationError, NotFoundError

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

_config = load_config()
_db = DatabaseConnection(_config.database_url)
_cache = CacheManager(_config.redis_url)

@dataclass
class AppState:
    initialized: bool = False
    startup_time: Optional[datetime] = None
    request_count: int = 0
    error_count: int = 0

_state = AppState()

def initialize() -> None:
    global _state
    _db.connect()
    _cache.connect()
    _state.initialized = True
    _state.startup_time = datetime.utcnow()
    logger.info("Application initialized")

def shutdown() -> None:
    _db.disconnect()
    _cache.disconnect()
    logger.info("Application shutdown")

def get_user(user_id: int) -> User:
    _state.request_count += 1
    cached = _cache.get(f"user:{user_id}")
    if cached:
        return deserialize_user(cached)
    user = _db.query(User).filter_by(id=user_id).first()
    if not user:
        raise NotFoundError(f"User {user_id} not found")
    _cache.set(f"user:{user_id}", serialize_user(user), ttl=3600)
    return user

def create_user(data: Dict[str, Any]) -> User:
    validate_request(data, "create_user")
    user = User(**data)
    _db.add(user)
    _db.commit()
    _cache.set(f"user:{user.id}", serialize_user(user), ttl=3600)
    return user

def update_user(user_id: int, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> User:
    validate_request(data, "update_user")
    user = get_user(user_id)
    for key, value in data.items():
        setattr(user, key, value)
    _db.commit()
    _cache.delete(f"user:{user_id}")
    return user

def delete_user(user_id: int) -> None:
    user = get_user(user_id)
    _db.delete(user)
    _db.commit()
    _cache.delete(f"user:{user_id}")

initialize()
